final:
module RefModule(
    input I0,
    input I1,
    input S,
    input clk,
    output reg O
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (S == 0) begin
        O <= I0;
    end else begin
        O <= I1;
    end
end

endmodule
